body:
This ~is a work in progress -~ PR is introducing a Bathymetry metadata to download and apply diverse bathymetry datasets. At the moment I am just implementing ETOPO, may do ACCESS in the future.

~The code currently isn't working but I thought I would push it so I can get help from others!~ (@navidcy edit)

Resolves https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/issues/491

labels.description: When things aren't as smooth as expected
labels.name: bathymetry ⛰️

labels.description: We must feed the models so they don't get cranky
labels.name: data wrangling

title: Add Bathymetry metadata to allow using diverse bathymetry datasets
